phq9_1:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Little interest or pleasure in doing things.
phq9_2:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling down, depressed, or hopeless.
phq9_3:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Trouble falling or staying asleep, or sleeping to much.
phq9_4:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling tired or having little energy.
phq9_5:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Poor appetite or overeating.
phq9_6:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Feeling bad about yourself, or that you are a failure or have let yourself or your family down.
phq9_7:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Trouble concentrating on things such as reading the newspaper or watching television.
phq9_8:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Moving or speaking so slowly that other people could have noticed. Or the opposite - being so fidgety or restless that you have been moving around a lot more than usual.
phq9_9:
Over the past 2 weeks, how often have you been bothered by any of the following problems?

Read each item carefully and then select the one response that best reflects your experience. - Thoughts that you would be better off dead, or of hurting yourself.
m3vas_ch_mood_1: Place a mark on the line to indicate any changes in your mood. - Very much worse (-50)
m3vas_ch_pleasure_1:
Place a mark on the line to indicate any changes in your ability to enjoy life activities (e.g. work, family and friends, hobbies, television, books or magazines, meals etc.). - Much less able to enjoy

any activities (-50)
m3vas_ch_suicidal_1: Place a mark on the line to indicate any changes in how severely/frequently you have experienced thoughts or feelings about suicide. - Much more suicidal (0)
